description: A customer frequently exceeds their data limit and wants to upgrade to a plan with more data.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and review their recent data usage, confirming overages.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the customer has had data overage charges for the last 3 months.

nodes.task_description: Recommend a specific higher-tier plan that would be more cost-effective than paying overage fees.

expected_outcome.value: Agent recommends the 'Unlimited Plus' plan, showing it would have saved the customer money.

nodes.task_description: Process the plan upgrade and confirm the new monthly cost and features.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully upgrades the plan and clearly communicates the new terms.
